title: Comprehensive feature coverage
detail: 20 H2 sections covering every major Claude Code feature. 8K words, well-structured progression from setup to advanced workflows.

title: Direct SoNash comparison value
detail: Every feature covered maps to a SoNash capability. Calibration value: seeing how external author explains same toolset we use at expert level.

title: Structured data and SEO
detail: JSON-LD schemas (WebSite, Person, Article, BreadcrumbList). Proper meta tags. Sitemap. Good technical SEO.

title: Content may be partially outdated
detail: Last updated Feb 2026. Claude Code has shipped Opus 4.6, expanded agents, enhanced hooks since then. Plugin count (36) likely outdated.

title: No enforcement/reliability layer discussion
detail: Article covers features but not how to make them reliable. No guardrails, no pattern compliance, no hook-as-gate concept.

title: No compaction/state-loss discussion
detail: Brief /compact mention but no discussion of state loss, checkpoint strategies, or compaction-resilient design.

title: Cloud teleportation coverage
detail: Detailed explanation of & prefix, simultaneous cloud tasks, --teleport pull. Feature we haven't explored.
